source.attribution: "Natural Korean Conversation with 태웅쌤 | 이렇게 귀하신 분이 ①" by Didi's Korean Culture Podcast, used under Creative Commons Attribution license (reuse allowed).

reproducible.note: Re-running this pipeline over the same audio does NOT reproduce this capture. The diarizer returns a different segmentation each call (11 to 15 segments have been observed on this clip), so cue count, boundaries and coverage move between runs. This capture is one honest sample, not a fixture. It was not re-rolled to obtain a better coverage number, and a future capture that differs is evidence of that variance rather than of a regression.

config.abstention: fail closed on a measured disagreement; abstain where the cross-check produced no words at all

config.note: One-shot. It is handed the prepped path's windows for free, so it is a foil for translation, entities and honesty, NOT for segmentation.

unscored.reason: This capture contains no human output judgments, so it cannot measure correctness. Frozen gold is consumed only by the separate score path after exact-byte-bound human labels exist. Coverage is not a score and says nothing about which system was right. Nothing in this file alone may be rendered on /benchmarks/ as evidence of quality.

1321-cold.text: There are a few people here.

units.source: 어떤 분은 태국 갔다 오셨다고 했거든요.

corroboration.heard: 어떤 분은 태국 갔다 오셨다고 했거든요

1321-prepped.text: Someone said they'd been to Thailand.

1321-cold.text: One person said they went to Thailand.

1321-prepped.text: And they said Thailand was really great.

1321-cold.text: They said Thailand was really nice.

units.source: 저 태국에 한국어 학원을 차리는 게 꿈이에요

corroboration.heard: 제가 태국에 한국어 학원을 차리는게 꿈이에요

withheld.reason: Korean — not in the closed cast and not in the glossary

1321-cold.text: My dream is to open a Korean language school in Thailand.

withheld.reason: two recognisers agree only 0.50 on this window (< 0.6)

units.source: 아니 그 예전에 코로나 사태 이전에 누나랑 친누나가

corroboration.heard: 왜요 아니 그 예전에 코로나 사태 이전에 누나랑

1321-prepped.text: I mean, before the COVID pandemic, my noona and my older sister...

1321-cold.text: Why? Well, before the COVID-19 situation, with my sister,

withheld.reason: two recognisers agree only 0.00 on this window (< 0.6)

units.source: 그 막 그 매형이랑 태국에 한 달 살기를 하려고 했는데

corroboration.heard: 그 막 그 매형이랑 태국에 한달 살기를 하려고 했는데

1321-prepped.text: Like, they were going to do a month-long stay in Thailand with my brother-in-law, but

1321-cold.text: we were planning to live in Thailand for a month with her husband,

units.source: 그 내용이 너무 바쁘셔가지고 남는 사람이 저밖에 없어서 그 공짜로 태국 한달살기를 한 적이 있어요 아 근데 그 치앙마이에서 한달을 살았는데 너무 동네가 예쁘고 사람들도 너무 친절하고 한국어

corroboration.heard: 그 매형이 너무 바쁘셔가지고 남는 사람이 저밖에 없어서 그 공짜로 태국 한달 살기를 한 적이 있어요 아 근데 그 치앙마이에서 한달을 살았는데 너무 동네가 예쁘고 사람들도 너무 친절하고 한국어

withheld.reason: Korean — not in the closed cast and not in the glossary

1321-cold.text: but her husband was too busy, so I was the only one available, and I ended up living in Thailand for a month for free. Oh, but I lived in Chiang Mai for a month, and the neighborhood was so beautiful, and the people were so kind, and Korean...

notes: A real pipeline execution over real media, pinned before output labeling so later review binds the exact bytes. 8 of 12 lines committed, 4 withheld by a gate that fired, 2 committed uncorroborated because the cross-check recogniser drops backchannels and produced no words in those windows. Confidence throughout is agreement between two independent recognisers, never a model's estimate of itself. Glossary: 6 terms, cast NOT closed (nobody is named in the window, so there is no cast to close).
